name: Uninterruptible Power Supply (UPS) Module for Raspberry Pi/Jetson Nano Supports Charging and Power Output at The Same Time 3S & 5V 5A Output
shortName: Uninterruptible Power Supply (UPS) Module for Raspberry Pi/Jetson
description: UPS module for Raspberry Pi and Jetson Nano with 5V 5A output and simultaneous charge/power capability.
